events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: sequence check for rigid & PVC conduit commercial project. Crew log shows required preparatory steps finished before current operation. Hold points signed, materials staged in order, no skipped step visible in photo set. Reference NEC Art 344, 352. Task: evaluate field condition, return decision with observations. Since no violations, decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete maybe 50? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Order maybe list of step-ids? Not requested but schema includes order. We can include observed sequence step IDs? Since no specific step IDs given, maybe empty list. Workable empty list. Findings empty. Actions maybe none. Rationale: prep complete, hold points signed, materials staged, no skipped steps; work proceeds in proper sequence per NEC. References NEC Art 344, 352. Need ensure valid JSON.
